lab: yuan chu wei lan tian kong xia yong dong zhe jin se de mai lang jiu zai na li ceng shi ni he wo ai guo de di fang dang wei feng dai zhe shou huo de wei dao chui xiang wo lian pang
lab_without_tone: yuan chu wei lan tian kong xia yong dong zhe jin se de mai lang jiu zai na li ceng shi ni he wo ai guo de di fang dang wei feng dai zhe shou huo de wei dao chui xiang wo lian pang
raw_text:
远处蔚蓝天空下
涌动着金色的麦浪
就在那里曾是你和我
爱过的地方
当微风带着收获的味道
吹向我脸庞
